_comment: Fixture-stem -> deployed live canary URL. Only fixtures with an entry here are genuinely probed live by oracle/batch_runner.py; every other fixture in the corpus honestly reports SKIPPED-NO-LIVE-URL (never a fabricated pass). Add an entry here only after a real per-fixture canary page has been deployed (out of scope for this runtime to create).
_note_rt_centred_maxwidth: This canary page IS live (verified 2026-07-22) but currently produces NO-SECTIONS: the fixture's top-level DOM node carries only the semantic class '.sgs-team-member-grid', which is not itself a registered block slug, so oracle.render_oracle.discover_sections finds zero root candidates on it (a pre-existing recognition-layer gap, not something this batch runner should paper over). Kept here as a real, honestly-reported finding rather than removed.
